targets.query:
from(bucket: "Nephele")
  |> range(start: 0)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "Temperature")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "5700")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["sensor_id"] == "3303")
  |> last()
  //layer: yamlLayer1, ranges: [0,35,70]

from(bucket: "Nephele")
  |> range(start: 0)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "Humidity")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "5700")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["sensor_id"] == "3304")
  |> last()
  //layer: yamlLayer1, ranges: [0,50,100]
